title: AbsenceRecord.absence_reason — canonical values
description: Known values for absence_reason. The list is advisory — free-text is permitted for cases not covered here, but policy.auto_excuse_reasons matches these canonical strings. Adding a value here doesn't automatically make it auto-excused; the tenant's policy chooses which subset auto-excuses.

values.description: Athlete missed the session due to illness or injury with supporting documentation (medical note uploaded via documented_url_signed).
Athlete missed due to illness / injury but no documentation provided.
values.notes: Admin decides whether to excuse post-hoc. Default status stays 'unexcused' until reviewed.

values.description: Guardian pre-notified > 24h in advance of a family emergency.
Family emergency reported after the missed session. Admin reviews individually.
Guardian pre-notified of a planned vacation absence.
values.notes: Some tenants configure vacation notice > 7 days for auto-excusal.

values.description: Missed due to transportation / logistics (traffic, missed ride, etc.).
Athlete had an unavoidable school commitment (exam, mandatory event).
Athlete observing a religious holiday or ritual.
Severe weather prevented safe travel to the venue. Often tenant-level (session cancelled) rather than athlete-level.
No reason given (guardian didn't fill the field, or admin recorded the absence without reason).
Catchall — free-text explanation lives in the explanation column.
